Origin Displayed: English - Spelling variations of this family name include: Audeley, Audley, Audeleye, Awdelye, Audeleygh, Aldeoalega, Audsley, Audless and many more. First found in Staffordshire, where they were seated from ancient times. Some of the first settlers of this family name or some of its variants were: John Audley, who sailed to Salem, Massachusetts in 1630; William Audley to Barbados in 1635; Margaret Audless to America in 1746; W.R. Audling to Baltimore in 1823. (From www.HouseOfNames.com Archives copyright  2000 - 2009). This interesting name is of Anglo-Saxon origin, and is a locational surname deriving from the place called "Audley" near Lichfield in Staffordshire. The placename is recorded in the Domesday Book of 1086 C.E. as "Aldidelege", and in the Staffordshire Pipe Rolls of 1182 as "Aldithelega". The name means "Ealdgith's glade", derived from the Old English pre-7th Century female personal name "Ealdgith", composed of the elements "eald", old, and "gyth", battle, with "leah", this wood, galde, clearing. Locational surnames were usually acquired by those former inhabitants of a place who has moved to another area, and were thereafter best identified by the name of their birthplace. The marriage of John Audley and Frances Page was recorded at Tottenham in London on 22 September 1577. The first recorded spelling of the family name is shown to be that of Alice Audley (christening), which was dated 1225, Tunstall by Stoke upon Trent, Staffordshire, during the reign of King Henry 3rd, "The Frenchman", 1216 - 1272. Surnames became necessary when governments introduced personal taxation. In England this was known as Poll Tax. Throughout the centuries, surnames in every country have continued to "develop" often leading to astonishing variants of the original spelling.  Copyright: Name Origin Research www.surnamedb.com 1980 - 2014.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de Audley於大約1300年出生在英國斯塔福爾時，她的父親Sir Hugh Audley of Sratton Audley34歲，母親Isolde de Mortimer39歲。她於1317年11月25日與Ralph Greystoke在英國英格蘭奧可福爾斯特拉頓 奧德利結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1374年在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德享年75歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭達勒姆達勒姆 凱德拉爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice de Audley于大约1300年出生在英国斯塔福爾时，她的父亲Sir Hugh Audley of Sratton Audley34岁，母亲Isolde de Mortimer39岁。她于1317年11月25日与Ralph Greystoke在英国英格兰奧可福爾斯特拉頓 奧德利结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1374年在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德享年75岁，埋葬在英国英格兰達勒姆達勒姆 凱德拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Audley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Audley in Staffordshire, named from the Old English female personal name Aldgȳth + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de Audley was born about 1300, in Staffordshire, England, her father, Sir Hugh Audley of Sratton Audley, was 34 and her mother, Isolde de Mortimer, was 39. She married Ralph Greystoke on 25 November 1317, in Stratton Audley, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died in 1374, in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 75, and was buried in Durham Cathedral, Durham, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice de Audley est née environ 1300, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Hugh Audley of Sratton Audley, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Isolde de Mortimer, avait 39 ans. Elle a épousé Ralph Greystoke le 25 novembre 1317, à Stratton Audley, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée en 1374, à Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterrée à Durham Cathedral, Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice de Audleyが約1300年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Hugh Audley of Sratton Audleyは34歳，母Isolde de Mortimerは39歳であった。1317年11月25日にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアストラットオン アウドリーでRalph Greystokeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1374年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドで75歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスダルハムダルハム カスエドラルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Audley(이)가 대략 1300년 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Hugh Audley of Sratton Audley(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isolde de Mortimer(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 1317년 11월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 스트래턴 오들리에서 Ralph Greystoke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1374년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 뒤람 캐테드럴에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de Audley родилась около 1300 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Hugh Audley of Sratton Audley было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Isolde de Mortimer, 39. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph Greystoke 25 ноября 1317 г. в местности страттон аудли, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла в 1374 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 75 лет и была похоронена в местности дурам кэтедраль, дурам, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice de Audley nació aproximadamente 1300, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Hugh Audley of Sratton Audley, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Isolde de Mortimer, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Ralph Greystoke el 25 de noviembre de 1317, en Stratton Audley, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 1374, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultada en Durham Cathedral, Durham, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
